cannotChangeSelf: You cannot change your own role
cannotChangeOwnAccess: You cannot change access for your own account
lastAdminError: At least one administrator must remain
revokeDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke this user's access? Their records will be preserved, but they will no longer be able to sign in.
reactivateDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to reactivate this user's access? They will be able to sign in again.
